subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto the Desired One, who hath vouchsafed strength unto His chosen ones and endowed them with power [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حمد حضرت مقصودی را لایق و سزاست که اولیای خود را قوت بخشید قدرت عطا فرمود و
subcodes.subjects: @Word of God and human limitations, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @unity; oneness of humanity
